originalTitle: Cruise passengers tell of life on board ship stranded off Cape Verde after hantavirus outbreak
title: Cruise passengers tell of life on board ship stranded off Cape Verde after hantavirus outbreak
content: While passengers onboard the MV Hondius say the situation is calm, they face days at sea as officials warn the disease may have spread.

originalTitle: Police officer tells of operation to retrieve human remains from crocodile
title: Police officer tells of operation to retrieve human remains from crocodile
content: DNA tests are underway to confirm whether remains found inside the crocodile match that of a missing man.

originalTitle: Sudan accuses Ethiopia and UAE of orchestrating drone attacks on airport
title: Sudan accuses Ethiopia and UAE of orchestrating drone attacks on airport
content: Sudan's foreign minister says Ethiopia and UAE has chosen the "wrong path" and would regret it.

originalTitle: Saudi Arabia posts $33.5bn budget deficit amid drop in oil sales
title: Saudi Arabia posts $33.5bn budget deficit amid drop in oil sales
content: Kingdom announces sharp rise in budget shortfall amid the effective closure of the Strait of Hormuz.

originalTitle: Israeli attacks on southern, eastern Lebanon kill at least six people
title: Israeli attacks on southern, eastern Lebanon kill at least six people
content: Israel issues forced displacement orders for 12 villages in southern Lebanon.

originalTitle: Colombia tourist jewel plagued by violence
title: Colombia tourist jewel plagued by violence
content: Armed groups’ extortion and turf wars in Colombia’s Sierra Nevada threaten Indigenous communities and tourism boom.

originalTitle: To stay or risk the 'Road of Death' - Ukrainian civilians trapped in frontline city
title: To stay or risk the 'Road of Death' - Ukrainian civilians trapped in frontline city
content: People in the Ukrainian city of Oleshky say they have been cut off from fresh supplies of food or medicine for months.

originalTitle: BBC traces how 10 minutes of Israeli bombing brought devastation to Lebanon
title: BBC traces how 10 minutes of Israeli bombing brought devastation to Lebanon
content: The bombs started falling at 14:15 in the afternoon - bringing chaos and destruction across the country.

originalTitle: Bowen: Strait of Hormuz standoff raises risk of sliding back into all-out war
title: Bowen: Strait of Hormuz standoff raises risk of sliding back into all-out war
content: The US and Iran's determination to keep the pressure on each other has put the fragile Gulf ceasefire in serious jeopardy.

originalTitle: The league is the dream - but is this Arsenal's moment in Europe?
title: The league is the dream - but is this Arsenal's moment in Europe?
content: All the talk has been about Arsenal's Premier League title challenge - but is this now the Gunners' time to conquer Europe?

originalTitle: Where do Bayern's prolific trio rank in greatest front threes ever?
title: Where do Bayern's prolific trio rank in greatest front threes ever?
content: Bayern Munich's attack of Harry Kane, Luis Diaz and Michael Olise has hit 100 goals this season. With the second leg of the Champions League semi-final with PSG coming up, BBC Sport compares the two front threes.

originalTitle: Our World Cup host 'is Fifa, not Trump or America' - Iran
title: Our World Cup host 'is Fifa, not Trump or America' - Iran
content: Iran's football chief Mehdi Taj says their World Cup host "is Fifa, not Mr Trump or America" and calls for respect towards the nation's delegation if the national team is to travel to the United States for this summer's tournament.
